nodes.title: Model Links
widgets_values:
## Model Links

**text_encoders**

- [qwen_2.5_vl_7b_fp8_scaled.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/HunyuanVideo_1.5_repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_2.5_vl_7b_fp8_scaled.safetensors)

**loras**

- [Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-Lightning-4steps-V1.0-bf16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/lightx2v/Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-Lightning/resolve/main/Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-Lightning-4steps-V1.0-bf16.safetensors)

**diffusion_models**

- [qwen_image_edit_2511_bf16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image-Edit_ComfyUI/resolve/main/split_files/diffusion_models/qwen_image_edit_2511_bf16.safetensors)

**vae**

- [qwen_image_vae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/resolve/main/split_files/vae/qwen_image_vae.safetensors)


Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │      └── qwen_2.5_vl_7b_fp8_scaled.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 loras/
│   │      └── Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-Lightning-4steps-V1.0-bf16.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │      └── qwen_image_edit_2511_bf16.safetensors
│   └── 📂 vae/
│          └── qwen_image_vae.safetensors
```


## Report Issue

Note: please [update ComfyUI](https://docs.comfy.org/installation/update_comfyui) first and prepare required models. Desktop/Cloud will be updated after the stable release; nightly-supported models may not be included yet, please wait for the next stable release.

- Cannot run / runtime errors: [ComfyUI/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI/issues)
- UI / frontend issues: [ComfyUI_frontend/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI_frontend/issues)
- Workflow issues: [workflow_templates/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/issues)

nodes.title: KSampler settings
widgets_values:
You can test and find the best setting by yourself. The following table is for reference.
|   | Qwen | Comfy |
|--------|---------|------------|
| Steps  | 40      | 20         |
| CFG    | 4.0     | 4.0       |

nodes.title: Note
widgets_values: The node below is a subgraph. Learn more at [Subgraph docs](https://docs.comfy.org/interface/features/subgraph)
The "Edit Model Reference Method" nodes above are not needed if you use Comfy files, but may be needed if you use repackaged ones from other people.

nodes.title: TextEncodeQwenImageEditPlus (Positive)
widgets_values: Only change the pillow texture in image 1 to the soft hairy fur material in image 2. Leave the rest unchanged

nodes.title: new_w  =  zone(square_or_aligned) if mode else src_w
widgets_values: (e if f else floor(min(b, c, ceil(a / max(1, g)) * max(1, g)) / max(1, g)) * max(1, g)) if d else c

nodes.title: new_h  =  zone(square_or_aligned) if mode else src_h
widgets_values: (e if f else floor(min(b, c, ceil(a / max(1, g)) * max(1, g)) / max(1, g)) * max(1, g)) if d else c

nodes.title: new_x  =  min(new_x_left, src_w - new_w) if mode else 0
widgets_values: min(a, b - c) if d else 0

nodes.title: new_y  =  min(new_y_top, src_h - new_h) if mode else 0
widgets_values: min(a, b - c) if d else 0

nodes.title: avail_w  (anti-clamp W)
widgets_values: max(min(a + b / 2, c - (a + b / 2)) * 2, min(c, e if d else b))

nodes.title: avail_h  (anti-clamp H)
widgets_values: max(min(a + b / 2, c - (a + b / 2)) * 2, min(c, e if d else b))

nodes.title: square_side  =  min(aligned_max_dim, src_w, src_h)
widgets_values: floor(min(ceil(a / max(1, d)) * max(1, d), b, c) / max(1, d)) * max(1, d)

nodes.title: target_w  (resize width with target_size)
widgets_values: a if (c == 0 and max(a, b) <= 2048) else floor(a * (c if c > 0 else 2048) / max(a, b) / max(1, d)) * max(1, d)

nodes.title: target_h  (resize height with target_size)
widgets_values: b if (c == 0 and max(a, b) <= 2048) else floor(b * (c if c > 0 else 2048) / max(a, b) / max(1, d)) * max(1, d)

nodes.title: pad_w_total  =  0 if zone else ceil(max(w,h)/8)*8 - w
widgets_values: 0 if c else ceil(max(a, b) / 8) * 8 - a

nodes.title: pad_h_total  =  0 if zone else ceil(max(w,h)/8)*8 - h
widgets_values: 0 if c else ceil(max(a, b) / 8) * 8 - b

nodes.title: Crop back to orig dims (no-op if zone)
